question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest average unemployment rate for ages 16-19 across U.S. states? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A labor economist wants to pinpoint the worst year for teen unemployment after the recession.

1.fact: Filtering Area Type = "State" and averaging Age 16-19 by Year for 2011-2016, the maximum average occurs in 2012 at 0.35391666666666666.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest average unemployment rate for ages 16-19 across U.S. states? (Filter Area Type == "State"; average Age 16-19 by Year; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest average unemployment rate for ages 16-19 across states? (Filter Area Type == "State"; average Age 16-19 by Year; select the maximum.) The answer is 2012.
